overall.description: First-person exploration of a medieval Nordic longhouse interior in a video game, featuring detailed wooden architecture, NPCs in period clothing, and warm candlelit ambiance. The player moves through halls, corridors, a bedroom, and up stone stairs while observing the environment.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a medieval longhouse entry hall with a wooden bench, decorative shield, and feather wall hangings. Two NPCs are present - a standing guard and a seated villager. The camera moves forward toward a dark doorway at the end of the hall.

segments.scene_description: Moving through a dark wooden corridor that transitions into a candlelit hallway. The lighting shifts from dim to warm as the camera progresses. An armored NPC walks past in the opposite direction as the camera approaches a doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval bedroom with wooden furniture and animal trophies

segments.scene_description: Entering a cozy medieval bedroom featuring a wooden bed, wardrobe, and storage chest. Animal head trophies adorn the walls, and a woven rug covers the floor. The camera explores the room, panning to show the furniture and decorations before heading toward the exit door.

events.description: beginning to ascend the stone staircase to upper level
reaching the upper level landing from the stairs

segments.scene_description: Moving through narrow interior corridors with wooden beams and wall candles, then ascending a stone staircase toward an upper level. A distant figure is visible standing at the end of the corridor ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level balcony with wooden architecture

approaching large wooden door at the end of the balcony walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto an upper level balcony with wooden architecture and stone walls. An NPC is visible standing on an adjacent balcony. The scene ends as the camera approaches a large reinforced wooden door at the end of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the interior of a medieval longhouse, transitioning from a public entry hall into private quarters and finally ascending to an upper balcony. It begins in a hall decorated with shields and feather hangings, moving past a guard and a seated villager toward a dark doorway. As the camera progresses through a dim wooden corridor, the lighting shifts to a warm, candlelit glow while an armored NPC passes by, leading the view into a cozy bedroom filled with animal trophies and woven rugs. The scene then shifts back into narrow, beam-lined corridors before ascending a stone staircase toward a distant figure. Finally, the camera emerges onto an upper-level balcony of stone and wood, passing another NPC before approaching a large reinforced wooden door at the end of the walkway.
